CustomField.description: The dominant sales motion for this account (Direct, Partner Led, Self-Serve, Channel Resale, Renewal). Backed by Northstar_Sales_Motion GVS; reused on Opportunity for routing and forecasting.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How the account is sold to. Drives routing rules, the deal-desk approver path, and renewal automation.
CustomField.label: Sales Motion
